issue: EN_TO_ZH candidate still showed redaction-like horizontal bands on colored/blue backgrounds

actions: Reviewed rendered candidate previews for EN_TO_ZH pages.
Rendered source-vs-output high-zoom crop for page 2.
Ran collect_visual_region_metrics.py on the old candidate after adding redaction_metrics.
steps.finding: Insertion-region checks alone did not cover redaction-only empty areas; colored-background wide line redactions could leave viewer-visible horizontal bands.

actions: Compared redaction fill provenance against local source ring backgrounds.
Inspected ZH_TO_EN table-header crop after the first sampling change.
steps.finding: Two generic mechanisms were needed: continuous background covers for band-prone colored redactions, and balanced fill sampling to avoid selecting distant page background for table/header cells.

actions: Changed fill sampling to outside_ring_median_pixel_cluster.
Set source priority to near-ring > inner-grid > far-outer-ring.
Added region_background_cover and residual_wide_line_background_cover before target text insertion.
steps.anti_overfit_basis: Rules use current-run bbox width, bbox height, background saturation, region kind, page type, and local sampled colors only.

actions: Added redaction_metrics for every redacted source unit.
Added covered_by_background_cover and wide_line_patch_risk.
Aggregated insertion-region residue and redaction-only band residue into background_residue_artifact.
Regenerated EN_TO_ZH candidate PDF.
Regenerated ZH_TO_EN candidate PDF.
Rendered candidate previews.
Collected visual region and redaction metrics.
Materialized deterministic visual adjudication.
Ran product quality gates with visual_region_metrics and visual_adjudication.
Ran anti-overfit scan with sample-sensitive tokens.
Updated standard process design document.
Updated tool contract, product-quality contract, repair matrix, tools README, D5/D7 prompt template, D8 prompt template, and prompt tool bindings.
Updated round11 final report and final verdict JSON.
files_updated: docs/业务流程/PDF_语义翻译回填_标准流程设计.md
